title: [BDTP] Bootleg's Definitive Trailer Pack
body:
# BOOTLEG'S DEFINITIVE TRAILER PACK [BDTP]
**A HIGH QUALITY TAKE ON THE TRAILER MODPACKS!**

**Explore a refreshed world with seasons, unique terrain, Restored Mobs, Breathtaking Sights, and Fluid Movement and Visual Appeal, A True Way to get immersed!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/huY9ScHNQnU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Ingame Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfe0a7843664562981d6ccf51a73d46c5adeda6d.png)

Screenshots, More Info, and ModList can be found here!
[https://sites.google.com/view/bootleg1089-art-profile/bdtp]

Trailer Skins That I Made for the pack can be found here!
[https://namemc.com/profile/BootLeg1090.1]

This pack is new and a work in progress so bugs are expected!!

want to see more of my works? my portfolio and contacts are here:
[https://lnk.bio/Bootleg1089]
